home.hero_h1: ¡Dios resucitó a Jesús de entre los muertos!
home.hero_h2: Hay esperanza para todos los que le siguen.
home.hero_body: En un mundo de dolor, muerte y mal, hay esperanza en el Hijo de Dios.
home.hero_cta: Nuestra iglesia puede ayudarle a seguir a Jesús.
home.series_desc: Explorando la pura bondad de Jesús — sus palabras, su poder, su compasión y lo que está dispuesto y puede hacer por nosotros hoy.
home.welcome_body: Lake Shore Church es una comunidad de creyentes en el West Loop de Chicago. Enseñamos la Escritura, seguimos a Jesús y construimos comunidad. Todos son bienvenidos — dondequiera que esté en su camino de fe.
home.testimonials_intro: Personas que encuentran esperanza en Lake Shore Church
home.pastor_daily: El Pastor Brian comparte una Escritura cada día. Síganos para mantenerse conectados.
home.facebook_followers: Únase a más de 600 seguidores en Facebook →
home.join_this_sunday: Únase este domingo a las 10:00 AM. Todos son bienvenidos.

about.page_desc: Nuestra iglesia puede ayudarle a seguir a Jesús.
about.meta_desc: Lake Shore Church en el West Loop de Chicago.
about.intro_1: En un mundo de dolor, muerte y mal, hay esperanza en el Hijo de Dios. Lake Shore Church existe para ayudar a las personas a seguir a Jesús — mediante la enseñanza basada en las Escrituras, la comunidad genuina y la adoración auténtica.
about.intro_3: Nuestro pastor es Craig Brian Larson (Pastor Brian), autor publicado y maestro bíblico expositivo.
about.pastor_bio: El Pastor Brian trae predicación expositiva clara cada domingo. Es autor de Know — Gaining Wisdom from God About Everything.
about.distinctives: Encuentre la verdad inerrante de las Escrituras en un mundo de confusión.

beliefs.page_desc: Core beliefs of Lake Shore Church from the Bible.
beliefs.meta_desc: Statement of faith — Lake Shore Church West Loop, Assemblies of God.
beliefs.intro: The following are the core beliefs of Lake Shore Church based on the foundational truths taught in the Bible.
beliefs.section_bible_body: The Bible is the inspired, inerrant Word of God, the revelation of God to man, the infallible, authoritative rule of faith and conduct.
beliefs.section_god_body: The one true God has revealed Himself as the eternally self-existent "I AM," the Creator of heaven and earth and the Redeemer of mankind. He has further revealed Himself as embodying the principles of relationship and association as Father, Son and Holy Spirit—one God, three persons.
beliefs.section_jesus_body: Jesus Christ is the eternal Son of God. He was born of a virgin, lived a sinless life, performed miracles, died on the cross for the forgiveness of sins, rose bodily from the dead, ascended to heaven, and will return again in power and glory.
beliefs.section_holy_spirit_body: The Holy Spirit equips believers with spiritual gifts for the purpose of building up the body of Christ and advancing the Kingdom of God.
beliefs.section_salvation_body: Salvation is a gift of God's grace and is received through repentance toward God and faith toward the Lord Jesus Christ. Man's only hope of redemption is through the shed blood of Jesus Christ the Son of God.
beliefs.section_church_body: The Church is the Body of Christ, the habitation of God through the Spirit, with divine appointments for the fulfillment of her great commission.
beliefs.section_baptism_body: Water baptism by immersion is an outward expression of one's faith in Jesus Christ. It symbolizes the believer's identification with Christ's death, burial, and resurrection.
beliefs.section_communion_body: Communion, also known as the Lord's Supper, commemorates the sacrificial death of Jesus Christ and the new covenant He established.
beliefs.section_second_coming_body: The Second Coming of Christ includes the rapture of the saints, which is our blessed hope, followed by the visible return of Christ with His saints to reign on earth for one thousand years.
beliefs.section_eternal_life_body: Those who have received salvation through faith in Jesus Christ will spend eternity in the presence of God, while those who reject Him will experience eternal separation from God.
beliefs.aog_intro: To read in greater detail the beliefs of the Assemblies of God, with whom our church is affiliated,
beliefs.aog_link: visit the Assemblies of God statement of faith
beliefs.faq_1_q: What does Lake Shore Church believe?
beliefs.faq_1_a: We hold to scripture-based, Assemblies of God theology — the Bible as our authority, the Trinity, the bodily resurrection of Jesus, salvation by grace through faith, and the mission of the church to make disciples.
beliefs.faq_2_q: Is Lake Shore Church welcoming to newcomers?
beliefs.faq_2_a: Yes — everyone is welcome wherever they are on their journey of faith.
beliefs.faq_3_q: What denomination is Lake Shore Church?
beliefs.faq_3_a: Lake Shore Church is part of the Assemblies of God.
beliefs.distinctives: Encuentre la verdad inerrante de las Escrituras en un mundo de confusión.

sermons.page_desc: Mensajes de la Palabra de Dios.

dedication.page_desc: Esta plataforma se ofrece para la gloria de Dios.
dedication.meta_desc: Dedication of the Lake Shore Church digital platform to Jesus Christ, under the direction of the Holy Spirit.
dedication.opening: This website and mobile application are dedicated to the Lord Jesus Christ — to make His gospel known, to serve His church in Chicago's West Loop, and to welcome every nation and tongue. Whatever is true, honorable, and built with excellence here is for Him; whatever falls short is ours to repent of and improve.
dedication.holy_spirit_heading: El Espíritu Santo: Director de Tecnología
dedication.holy_spirit_body: Lake Shore Church affirms that the living God — Father, Son, and Holy Spirit — is sovereign over all creation, including every digital system we steward. In a deliberate and professional sense, we name the Holy Spirit as Director of Technology: God Himself guiding wisdom, conscience, security, accessibility, and purpose as we build tools for worship, discipleship, prayer, giving, and outreach. Software does not replace the preached Word, pastoral care, or the gathered congregation; technology serves at the Spirit's direction for the good of the body of Christ and the world He loves.
dedication.steward_body: A designated technology steward maintains this platform operationally — accounts, deployments, databases, and member access — as a servant of the church, accountable to church leadership and to Christ. This role is administrative, not ultimate: the Holy Spirit remains Director; we are coworkers with God (1 Corinthians 3:9). Permissions labeled admin in our systems refer to this human stewardship, not to any claim that a person replaces God's authority.
dedication.built_body: Sermons, events, prayer requests, multilingual pages, and member resources exist so that people may hear that God raised Jesus from the dead and that there is hope for all who follow Him. We pray this work strengthens Lake Shore Church and honors the Assemblies of God commitment to Scripture, the Spirit, and the Great Commission.
dedication.scripture_1: Unless the LORD builds the house, those who build it labor in vain. — Psalm 127:1
dedication.scripture_2: Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men. — Colossians 3:23
dedication.scripture_3: And they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and spoke the word of God with boldness. — Acts 4:31
dedication.closing: Soli Deo gloria — Solo a Dios la gloria.
dedication.platform_note: Lake Shore Church · West Loop · Chicago
dedication.salvation_heading: Una oración de fe en Jesús
dedication.salvation_intro: If you are ready to receive Christ, you may pray in your own words or use this example:
dedication.salvation_prayer: Lord Jesus, I know that I am a sinner, and I ask for Your forgiveness of all my sins. I believe You died for my sins and rose from the dead. Right now, I turn from my sins and invite You into my heart and life. Please forgive me, cleanse me, and fill me with Your Holy Spirit. I want to trust and follow You as my Lord and Savior. In Jesus' name, Amen.
dedication.next_steps_intro: If you prayed this prayer sincerely, you can take these next steps in your faith journey:
dedication.step_church_body: Find a welcoming local or virtual community where you can learn more about the Bible and grow in your faith. We would be honored to welcome you at Lake Shore Church in Chicago's West Loop.
dedication.step_church_visit: Plan a visit to Lake Shore Church
dedication.step_church_finder: Find Assemblies of God churches in the Chicago area
dedication.step_bible_body: Start reading the New Testament (such as the Book of John) to learn about Jesus and the guidance of the Holy Spirit. You can read or listen online.
dedication.step_prayer_body: Prayer is simply talking to God. Continue sharing your heart, struggles, and thankfulness with Him daily.
dedication.step_prayer_link: Submit a prayer request to our church
